theme: 大明的一两银子，最后压在谁身上

items.title: 碎银称量
items.description: 一块碎银放上戥秤，帝国财政首先变成县衙桌上的重量。
items.prompt: Horizontal cinematic Ming dynasty historical drama still, "Weighing Broken Silver". Close-up in a county tax office: a small piece of broken silver weighed on a brass scale, abacus, blank tax papers, rough wooden table, clerk hands in plain robes, muted daylight, no readable text, no logos, historically inspired Chinese realism, 16:9.

items.title: 县衙税房
items.description: 农户、胥吏和柜台把白银制度压缩成一间拥挤的税房。
items.prompt: Horizontal cinematic Ming dynasty historical drama still, "County Tax Room". A crowded county yamen tax room, clerks behind wooden counters, peasants holding cloth bundles and blank tax slips, abacus beads, inkstones, official seal boxes, tense waiting, no readable text, no logos, historically inspired Chinese realism, 16:9.

items.title: 鱼鳞图册

items.title: 漕粮船
items.description: 满载粮袋的运河船说明财政不只是银子，也是物流、劳役和时间。

items.title: 边军军饷

items.title: 矿监山场

items.title: 灾荒粥棚

items.title: 胥吏算盘

items.title: 崇祯夜案
